narration: Some species punch above their weight — remove them and ecosystems unravel.
visual_description: Hook visual: Some species punch above their weight — remove them and ecosystems unravel.
ai_image_prompt: Hook visual: Some species punch above their weight — remove them and ecosystems unravel.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Hook visual: Some species punch above their weight — remove them and ecosystems unravel.

narration: These are called keystone species, vital to their habitats’ health.
visual_description: Context visual: These are called keystone species, vital to their habitats’ health.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: These are called keystone species, vital to their habitats’ health.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: These are called keystone species, vital to their habitats’ health.

narration: Take the sea otter; without it, urchin populations explode and kelp forests vanish.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Take the sea otter; without it, urchin populations explode and kelp forests vanish.
ai_image_prompt: Escalation visual: Take the sea otter; without it, urchin populations explode and kelp forests vanish.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Escalation visual: Take the sea otter; without it, urchin populations explode and kelp forests vanish.

narration: Or consider wolves in Yellowstone. Their presence balances elk populations, promoting plant diversity.
visual_description: Evidence visual: Or consider wolves in Yellowstone. Their presence balances elk populations, promoting plant diversity.
ai_image_prompt: Evidence visual: Or consider wolves in Yellowstone. Their presence balances elk populations, promoting plant diversity.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Evidence visual: Or consider wolves in Yellowstone. Their presence balances elk populations, promoting plant diversity.

narration: Removing keystone species can lead to domino effects, collapsing entire ecosystems.
visual_description: Payoff visual: Removing keystone species can lead to domino effects, collapsing entire ecosystems.
ai_image_prompt: Payoff visual: Removing keystone species can lead to domino effects, collapsing entire ecosystems.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Payoff visual: Removing keystone species can lead to domino effects, collapsing entire ecosystems.

narration: But it’s not just about animals. Plants can be keystone too. Think of the mighty fig tree, supporting countless species.
